display.purpose: Hero and final-CTA headlines. Fraunces 400, set tight and large.

headline.purpose: Section titles, with an italic Logo Blue emphasis word.

label.purpose: Uppercase, 0.28em-tracked Logo Blue kicker above headlines and on CTAs.

shadows.name: ambient-low
shadows.purpose: Resting lift for cards and elevated surfaces. Barely there.

shadows.name: ambient-hover
shadows.purpose: Deeper diffuse shadow paired with translateY(-2px) on hover.

motion.name: ease-editorial
motion.purpose: Ease-out-expo for reveals, fade-ups, and state transitions.

motion.name: reveal
motion.purpose: Scroll-triggered content reveal via IntersectionObserver, staggered ~100ms.

motion.name: fade-up
motion.purpose: Hero element entrance, with delay-100/200/300 stagger.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The conversion CTA across the site. Logo Blue fill, ink text, uppercase wide-tracked label, sharp corners.
components.html: Book a consultation
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 12px; padding: 16px 28px; background: oklch(0.55 0.09 245); color: oklch(0.34 0.05 260); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.25em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; border: none; border-radius: 0; transition: background 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.78 0.08 235); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.55 0.09 245); } .ds-btn-arrow { width: 16px; height: 16px; transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover .ds-btn-arrow { transform: translateX(4px); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary CTA. Hairline border, ink text; border and text shift to Logo Blue on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 12px; padding: 16px 28px; background: oklch(0.97 0.012 240); color: oklch(0.34 0.05 260); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.25em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; border: 1px solid oklch(0.84 0.025 235); border-radius: 0; transition: border-color 0.3s, color 0.3s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { border-color: oklch(0.55 0.09 245); color: oklch(0.55 0.09 245); }

components.name: Eyebrow
components.description: The signature uppercase Logo Blue kicker that leads sections.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.28em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.55 0.09 245); margin: 0; }

components.name: Testimonial Card
components.description: Bordered, sharp-cornered figure with star row, serif quote, and hairline-divided attribution.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%; padding: 32px; background: oklch(0.97 0.012 240); border: 1px solid oklch(0.84 0.025 235); border-radius: 0; box-shadow: 0 8px 28px oklch(0.34 0.05 260 / 0.06); transition: box-shadow 0.3s, transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 16px 44px oklch(0.34 0.05 260 / 0.10); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-card-stars { display: flex; gap: 2px; margin-bottom: 24px; } .ds-card-stars svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; color: oklch(0.55 0.09 245); } .ds-card-quote { flex: 1; margin: 0; font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: oklch(0.34 0.05 260); } .ds-card-cite { margin-top: 32px; padding-top: 24px; border-top: 1px solid oklch(0.84 0.025 235 / 0.6); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-card-name { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.34 0.05 260); } .ds-card-detail { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.46 0.03 250); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Muted-fill field with a subtle border and a Logo Blue focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 8px 12px; background: oklch(0.93 0.015 235); color: oklch(0.34 0.05 260); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.84 0.025 235); border-radius: 4px; transition: box-shadow 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.46 0.03 250); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.55 0.09 245); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.55 0.09 245); }

components.name: Process Step
components.description: Numbered step with a Logo Blue top rule and serif heading. The signature editorial list unit.
components.html:
01

Consultation

We map your hairline and discuss the look you want, with no pressure.
components.css: .ds-step { border-top: 1px solid oklch(0.55 0.09 245); padding-top: 24px; } .ds-step-num { margin: 0; font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.125rem; color: oklch(0.55 0.09 245); } .ds-step-title { margin: 12px 0 0; font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: oklch(0.34 0.05 260); } .ds-step-body { margin: 12px 0 0; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.65; color: oklch(0.46 0.03 250); }

narrative.overview: This is the private studio of a master craftsman, not a clinic foyer and never a sales floor. Everything reads as deliberate: serif headlines set tight and large, cool slate neutrals, hairline rules, a film-grain hush over the surfaces, and a single restrained blue that marks the path forward. The work speaks; the interface gets out of its way. Confidence here is communicated through restraint, the way an expensive object earns trust by what it refuses to do. The system rejects the cheap-clinic playbook, the generic SaaS / AI-template look, the trendy and loud, and the cold sterile hospital. Density is generous: large type against wide whitespace, deliberate vertical rhythm, calm and discreet because the visitor is private and a little vulnerable.
keyCharacteristics: Editorial serif display (Fraunces) over a quiet humanist sans (Inter)
Cool slate-blue neutral foundation, never pure black or white
One accent, Logo Blue, used sparingly as wayfinding
Sharp corners, hairline borders, film grain instead of decoration
Soft ambient shadows for subtle dimensionality, never heavy or hard
Calm, scroll-revealed motion that honors prefers-reduced-motion

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Logo Blue appears on no more than ~10% of any screen. It is wayfinding, not decoration. If two elements both want the accent, one of them is wrong.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: Pure #000 and #fff are forbidden. Every neutral carries a trace of the brand hue (chroma ~0.01-0.05 toward 240-260). The cool tint is what makes the slate read as intentional rather than default.

rules.name: The Serif-Headline Rule
rules.body: Every h1-h4 is Fraunces at weight 400. Headings are never bold sans; weight contrast comes from the serif/sans split, not from heavy weights.

rules.name: The Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: Section intros lead with an uppercase, wide-tracked Logo Blue eyebrow at 0.28em tracking. It is the system's connective tissue.

rules.name: The Diffuse-Only Rule
rules.body: Shadows are always soft, wide, and tinted with ink (never neutral gray, never black). A small blur radius or alpha above ~0.12 is forbidden. Depth whispers; it does not announce.

dos: Do keep Logo Blue under ~10% of any screen, as wayfinding only (eyebrows, the one CTA, active nav, step numbers).
Do set every headline in Fraunces at weight 400; let the serif/sans split carry hierarchy, not bold weights.
Do lead sections with the uppercase, 0.28em-tracked Logo Blue eyebrow.
Do tint every neutral toward the brand hue; use Ink for black and Bone for white.
Do keep CTAs and cards sharp-cornered (0 radius); reserve the 4px softening for inputs only.
Do use soft, wide, ink-tinted ambient shadows when you want lift, paired with a small translateY on hover.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion: reveals and fades collapse to instant, content-complete rendering.
Do let real results (the gallery) carry the argument: show, don't tell.
donts: Don't build the cheap-clinic look: no neon BOOK NOW, no stock smiling models, no before/after spam wall, no discount-banner urgency.
Don't ship the generic SaaS / AI-template look: no uniform shadcn card grids, no gradient hero blobs, no hero-metric counters.
Don't go trendy, loud, or gimmicky: no brutalism, no neon, no heavy showy animation.
Don't drift into the cold, sterile hospital extreme (pure white + clinical teal). Warmth and credibility coexist.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) or colored side-stripe borders (border-left greater than 1px as an accent).
Don't use hard, dark, tight-blur drop shadows. If it looks like a 2014 app shadow, the blur is too small and the alpha too high.
Don't apply grain or heavy motion to small components; grain belongs on full-bleed sections.
Don't treat one language as primary: Greek and English layouts and tone must both feel native.
